message:
refactor(db): optimize case-insensitive comparisons and prune obsolete tests

- mail_explorer: replace `.to_lowercase().cmp()` with byte-level
  `.to_ascii_lowercase()` comparison in sort_entries, avoiding a
  temporary String allocation per comparison
- queries: use `eq_ignore_ascii_case` for stopword matching and
  duplicate-term detection in extract_like_terms instead of allocating
  lowercased copies
- migrate: remove two obsolete `try_parse_timestamp_micros` unit tests
  (parse_integer_string, parse_iso_dates_handles_malformed_safely) that
  tested edge cases no longer reachable after upstream refactoring

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
